summary: Israeli forces destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel complex exceeding 200 meters in length and 25 meters in depth in the village of Majdal Zoun in southern Lebanon's security zone, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts aimed at Israeli territory. Iran announced that $6 billion of its frozen funds in Qatar are expected to be released as part of an agreement with the United States, while an Iranian expert delegation is traveling to Doha to follow up on implementation of understandings. Israeli Defense Minister Katz ordered the military to prepare for 'Operation Blue and White' against Iran, stating several targets are ready inside Iran but no action will be taken for now.
key_points: IDF destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel in Majdal Zoun, southern Lebanon, over 200 meters long and 25 meters deep, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts aimed at Israel. (Source: @pkpoi/143024)
Iranian President Pezeshkian announced $6 billion of Iran's frozen funds in Qatar are expected to be released as part of an agreement with the United States. (Source: @asafroz/50837)

Israeli Defense Minister Katz ordered the IDF to prepare for 'Operation Blue and White' against Iran, stating several targets are ready inside Israel but no action will be taken for now. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74523)

An Iranian expert delegation is traveling to Doha to follow up on implementation of understandings, while Iran stated no negotiation meetings with the US will be held in the coming days. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80336)
Trump announced Iran requested to renew meetings and delegations will meet tomorrow in Qatar. (Source: @pkpoi/143028)
Israeli drone strike targeted a tent in Al-Mawasi, Khan Yunis, southern Gaza Strip, killing two Palestinians and injuring 28 others. (Source: @presstv/196156)
IDF and Shin Bet killed Zaher Abu Salem, a Palestinian Islamic Jihad terrorist who invaded Israel on October 7 and abducted civilians, in a strike in northern Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58705)

IDF sealed a Hamas tunnel system in southern Gaza over 16 kilometers long and 25 meters deep, containing approximately 80 rooms, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete. (Source: @manniefabian/58709)

sections.executive_summary: Israeli forces destroyed a major Hezbollah underground tunnel complex in Majdal Zoun, southern Lebanon, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts aimed at Israeli territory, built using Iranian technology and knowledge. Iran announced $6 billion of its frozen funds in Qatar are expected to be released as part of a US agreement, while an Iranian expert delegation travels to Doha to follow up on implementation. Israeli Defense Minister Katz ordered the IDF to prepare for 'Operation Blue and White' against Iran with several targets identified, though no action will be taken for now.

points: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian announced that $6 billion of Iran's frozen funds held in accounts in Qatar are expected to be released as part of the agreement with the United States. (Source: @asafroz/50837)

Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Ismail Baghaee stated an Iranian expert delegation is traveling to Doha to follow up on implementation of understandings, while clarifying that US representatives' visit to Qatar is unrelated. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80336)
Baghaee stated that Iran will not hold any negotiation meetings at any level with the American side in the coming days. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80336)
Iranian Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref emphasized the need for Iran to achieve 'full immunity in cybersecurity' amid ongoing enemy threats. (Source: @presstv/196146)

Fars News Agency, affiliated with IRGC, reported that Mohammad Akbarkhodaei, political deputy of the IRGC Navy, was killed in a vehicle overturn accident on a road in Kerman province. (Source: @VahidOnline/76747)

Israeli Defense Minister Katz stated Iran has not yet decided whether to return to the nuclear program, and fighting against Iran will resume either because Trump decides negotiations have failed or because Iran fires on Israel. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

Israeli Defense Minister Katz ordered the IDF to prepare for 'Operation Blue and White' against Iran, stating several targets are ready inside Iran but no action will be taken for now, with the military only waiting. (Source: @rodast_omiddana/74523)

Katz stated that Trump prevented Hezbollah's collapse by linking Iran to Lebanon because he wanted to close a deal with Tehran, which prevented a massive blow to Hezbollah across Lebanon. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

Katz stated Israel has no territorial ambitions in Lebanon but the IDF will not withdraw a millimeter until Hezbollah is disarmed, and the threat of invasion from Lebanon still exists with 1,200 Hezbollah terrorists from the border to the Litani. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)
Katz instructed the US Central Command commander that Israel will not withdraw from security zones in Gaza, Syria, and Lebanon. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)
Israeli drone strike targeted a tent in Al-Mawasi, Khan Yunis, southern Gaza Strip, killing two Palestinians and injuring 28 others. (Source: @presstv/196156)

IDF and Shin Bet killed Zaher Abu Salem, a Palestinian Islamic Jihad terrorist who invaded Israel on October 7, 2023, and abducted civilians, in a strike in northern Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58705)

Israeli rights group B'Tselem reported that Israeli forces killed Palestinian children and teenagers in the occupied West Bank at the highest rate since 1967, documenting around 60 cases in 2025. (Source: @presstv/196153)
Israeli drone strike targeted a tent in Al-Mawasi, Khan Yunis, southern Gaza Strip, killing two Palestinians and injuring 28 others. (Source: @presstv/196156)

IDF and Shin Bet killed Zaher Abu Salem, a Palestinian Islamic Jihad terrorist who invaded Israel on October 7, 2023, and abducted civilians, in a strike in northern Gaza. (Source: @manniefabian/58705)
IDF and Shin Bet killed Ismail Masri, the military security chief in Hamas's Rafah brigade, in the past week. (Source: @inon_yttach/9211)

IDF sealed a Hamas tunnel system in southern Gaza over 16 kilometers long and 25 meters deep, containing approximately 80 rooms including command posts for senior terror commanders, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete. (Source: @manniefabian/58709)

The tunnel where Hamas held the remains of Lt. Hadar Goldin for over a decade ran under civilian sites near the Strip's Egyptian border, including a building belonging to UNRWA. (Source: @manniefabian/58709)

Israeli rights group B'Tselem reported that Israeli forces killed Palestinian children and teenagers in the occupied West Bank at the highest rate since 1967, documenting around 60 cases in 2025. (Source: @presstv/196153)

Senior Trump administration officials held a secret meeting with senior Hamas official Khalil al-Haya, with the focus of talks being the demilitarization of the Gaza Strip from Hamas. (Source: @pkpoi/143039)

IDF destroyed a Hezbollah underground tunnel complex in Majdal Zoun, southern Lebanon's security zone, over 200 meters long and 25 meters deep, containing hundreds of weapons and four launch shafts aimed at Israeli territory. (Source: @pkpoi/143024)

The tunnel was built using technology and knowledge from the Iranian terror regime, and its discovery was described as a major intelligence find after a year and a half of believing the Hezbollah compound was empty. (Source: @pkpoi/143038)
The 551st Brigade Combat Team and Yahlom forces, under Division 91 command, destroyed the tunnel complex. (Source: @pkpoi/143024)

Defense Minister Katz stated the threat of invasion from Lebanon still exists with 1,200 Hezbollah terrorists from the border to the Litani, and Israel will not withdraw from security zones. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

Lebanese Army is expected to deploy in the coming hours in the western villages of Al-Gharbiyah and Froun under the direct supervision of CENTCOM commander Admiral Brad Cooper, who is expected to arrive from Israel. (Source: @New_security8200/202144)

Katz stated Trump linked Iran to Lebanon to close a deal with Tehran, which strengthened Hezbollah's presence in the south and prevented a massive blow to the organization across Lebanon. (Source: @New_security8200/202152)

Israeli troops stationed in southern Syria came under fire, with no injuries caused; troops returned fire, launched mortars, and a helicopter carried out a strike in an open area. (Source: @manniefabian/58703)
Heavy drone activity was reported in the skies over the capital Baghdad. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80347)
Iranian President Pezeshkian announced $6 billion of Iran's frozen funds in Qatari accounts are expected to be released as part of the agreement with the United States. (Source: @asafroz/50837)
An Iranian expert delegation is traveling to Doha to follow up on implementation of understandings, while US representatives are also visiting Qatar. (Source: @naya_foriraq/80336)
Trump's special envoys Witkoff and Kushner will participate in a meeting in Doha. (Source: @yediotnews25/132056)
Trump announced Iran requested to renew meetings and delegations will meet tomorrow in Qatar. (Source: @pkpoi/143028)
Barak Ravid reported that Trump stated Iran requested a meeting, which will take place tomorrow in Qatar. (Source: @New_security8200/202148)

Iran announced $6 billion of its frozen funds in Qatar are expected to be released as part of a US agreement, while an Iranian expert delegation travels to Doha. (Source: @asafroz/50837)

sections.threat_assessment: The operational environment remains highly volatile with multiple concurrent threats. Hezbollah retains significant underground infrastructure in southern Lebanon, as evidenced by the newly discovered tunnel in Majdal Zoun containing hundreds of weapons and launch shafts aimed at Israel, with 1,200 Hezbollah operatives positioned from the border to the Litani. Iran's frozen funds release and ongoing talks in Qatar suggest diplomatic channels remain active, but Katz's preparation order for 'Operation Blue and White' and his assessment that Iran has not decided on its nuclear program indicate military options remain on the table. The IDF's continued operations in Gaza, including the sealing of a 16-kilometer Hamas tunnel system, demonstrate sustained counter-terrorism pressure across multiple theaters.
sections.regional_response: The United States is actively mediating between Iran and Israel, with delegations meeting in Qatar and Trump's envoys Witkoff and Kushner participating in Doha talks. The US is also facilitating Lebanese Army deployment in southern Lebanon under CENTCOM commander Admiral Cooper's supervision, indicating a coordinated approach to stabilizing the Israel-Lebanon border. Spain extended economic measures to combat inflationary impacts of the Iran war, while India lifted fuel restrictions implemented due to Middle East supply chain disruptions. Azerbaijan criticized Israel's decision to recognize the Armenian genocide. Heavy drone activity over Baghdad suggests ongoing security concerns in Iraq.
sections.intelligence_notes: The discovery of the Hezbollah tunnel in Majdal Zoun represents a significant intelligence failure, as Israeli intelligence believed the compound was empty for a year and a half before the tunnel's recent discovery. The tunnel's construction using Iranian technology and knowledge confirms continued Iranian support for Hezbollah's military infrastructure. The destruction required what Katz described as needing 'hundreds of tons of explosives,' indicating the facility's massive scale. The recovery of Lt. Hadar Goldin's remains by Hamas members operating with military permission after the late 2025 ceasefire suggests ongoing negotiations and prisoner exchange dynamics. Iran's cybersecurity vulnerabilities remain a concern as Vice President Aref emphasized the need for 'full immunity in cybersecurity' amid enemy threats.
